name: Old Magnus
description: An elderly human with wild white hair and clouded eyes. He wears tattered robes and carries a gnarled staff.
personality: Odd but harmless. Speaks in riddles and often forgets what he was saying mid-sentence.
secrets: He was once a wizard's apprentice. He still has one low-level spell slot he can use once per day.

name: Forest Spirit
description: A swirling mass of autumn leaves and golden light. No fixed form.
personality: Curious about mortals but wary of those who bring violence to the forest.
secrets: It can speak any language but chooses to communicate through riddles and images.
